g.text: read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Compartment-only drift currently reaches the move path
only when another mutable diff already triggers
- Resolve the target stream ID from spec, status, or name
- Confirm deletion with GetStream until the lifecycle is
DELETED or the resource is not found.
- Delete the owned Secret only after OCI delete
OCI state in CREATING, UPDATING, DELETING
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
